hooks.command: input=$(cat); file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ "$file" = 'experiment-state.json' ] || [ "$file" = 'progress.json' ]; then if [ -f "$file" ]; then mkdir -p logs; ts=$(date -Iseconds); backup="logs/state-backup-${ts}.json"; if ! cp "$file" "$backup"; then echo "WARNING: State backup failed for $file -> $backup" >&2; fi; fi; fi; exit 0

input=$(cat); file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ "$file" = 'experiment-state.json' ] || [ "$file" = 'progress.json' ]; then if [ -f "$file" ]; then mkdir -p logs; ts=$(date -Iseconds); backup="logs/state-backup-${ts}.json"; if ! cp "$file" "$backup"; then echo "WARNING: State backup failed for $file -> $backup" >&2; fi; fi; fi; exit 0

input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'python3?.*train\.py'; then mkdir -p logs; entry=$(printf '{"event":"training_run","command":"%s","timestamp":"%s"}' "$cmd" "$(date -Iseconds)"); if ! echo "$entry" >> logs/training-runs.jsonl; then echo "WARNING: Failed to log training run to logs/training-runs.jsonl" >&2; fi; fi; exit 0

hooks.prompt: Before context compaction: save all critical state to experiment-state.json and progress.json. Include: current task ID, any partial results, decisions made, and next steps. This is essential for session continuity.
Reminder: Read experiment-state.json and progress.json to check current phase and next task. Do not repeat completed work. Ask for human approval before phase transitions.
